heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 761 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter $103,970,000 for fiscal year 2015, $112,001,000 for fiscal year 2016, $114,325,000 for fiscal year 2017, $116,860,000 for fiscal year 2018, $119,608,000 for fiscal year 2019, and $122,143,000 for fiscal year 2020.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 761 to 761b were omitted in the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub.
